name: Meatloaf- Vicki
recipeIngredient: Salt and black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Vicki Schlining -- Ellicott City, Maryland
Preparation Time: 0:30
1. Mix together the ground beef, onion, bread crumbs, beaten eggs, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, soup mix and seasonings.
2. Press mixture into a 9x5 inches loaf pan or 9 inches pie plate.
3. Cover tightly with tin foil.
4. Bake at 350°F for about an hour, uncovering during the last 20 minutes of baking time.
5. Let meatloaf stand for 10 minutes before serving.
